videos.title: Life Swap Villain, Blue Mass Blink, Mary Jane and More!  Daily MTG Spider-man Spoilers
videos.description:
Today in Spider-man we get the spiciest villain from the set, a disappointing Mary Jane, a crazy blue blink spell and more!
